summary: PHANTOM discovered a high-severity multi-step attack chain during the automated assessment, tracking vulnerability exposures across public-facing parameters.

findings.title: Exposed Backup Directory Configuration
findings.description: Sensitive environment configurations and archived database backups were found publicly accessible at /backup/db_dump.sql.

findings.title: Server Banner Information Disclosure
findings.description: The production server leaks internal component version information via standard response header blocks, aiding attacker profiling.
